---
title: "Joint resource holding potential and and contest assessment strategies in tropical birds"
image: "../images/card_pics/cban_001.jpg"
description: "This work investigates how duetting pairs assess rivals during territorial disputes. Using playback and behavioral observation, we test whether joint signaling improves defense efficiency or alters opponent assessment dynamics."
categories: ["contest assessment", "Animal Communication & Contest Dynamics"]
contributors: "Erin Stewart, Austin Barth, Jess Kowalski"
feature_order: "g"
format:
  html:
    toc: FALSE
---
